seo.meta_description: Professional conference video production for ecommerce brands. We film at your booth, deliver polished clips, and turn 3 days into 3 months of marketing content.
seo.og_description: We come to your booth, film sharp guided interviews, and deliver polished video assets. By the time you're home, you have marketing-ready content that keeps working.

form.trust_text: Hundreds of interviews recorded. 30+ years in ecommerce. Zero fluff.

data.title:
Turn your 3-day event into
3 months of marketing.
paragraphs: You're already spending serious money to exhibit: booth, travel, hotel, swag, team time. Our service helps you leave with more than just badge scans.
We come to your booth, film sharp guided interviews, and deliver polished video assets. By the time you're home, you have marketing-ready content that keeps working long after the booth comes down.

data.title: What We Do On-Site
data.subtitle: We show up at your booth with pro gear, a plan, and the experience to make your team look great on camera.

items.title: Natural Interviews
items.text: We guide relaxed, unscripted conversations that help your team sound confident, clear, and human on camera. No scripts. No awkward teleprompter reads. Just real people talking about what they know.

items.title: Professional Video and Audio
items.text: We use professional cameras and microphones to ensure your message looks and sounds as good as it deserves. Clean footage, clear audio, ready for any platform.

items.title: Strategic Guidance
items.text: We help shape answers in real time so the final videos are focused, useful, and easy to reuse across your business. We ask the right questions. We frame the conversation.

items.title: Booth and Event B-Roll
items.text: We capture the context and energy around your booth so your videos reflect the event, not just the interview. Product demos, team moments, floor traffic, the full picture.

paragraphs: Conferences are compressed attention. Your customers are there, your team is energized, and your messaging is sharp. We capture that energy before it fades.
No scripts. No awkward setups. We guide natural conversations that make your team sound like the experts they are.

data.title: Conferences are compressed attention.
paragraphs: Your customers are there. Your team is energized. Your messaging is sharp. It's one of the few times your company is fully "on."

Most companies walk away with a stack of badge scans and a vague plan to "follow up next week." By the time the team is home, the energy is gone. The talking points blur together. The conversations that felt so promising at the booth become cold outreach.
We capture that energy while it's live and turn it into authority, social proof, momentum, and content that compounds. One shoot. Months of marketing.
The difference isn't just having video. It's having video that was filmed when your team was at their best, talking to real people, about real problems, with real enthusiasm.

old_way.heading: Without Live Event Content
items: No video assets to show for it

new_way.heading: With Live Event Content
items: Leave with a video content library

data.label: From booth to brand
data.heading: One shoot. Months of content.
paragraphs: Every interview we film becomes a library of assets. Vertical clips for social. Horizontal cuts for your site. Captions, branding, raw footage. All included.
Best of all, we do all of this for you. Your team focuses on the event. We handle the content.
points: Social media clips ready to post
Sales follow-up videos that close deals
Email campaign content that stands out
data.title: Conference interview example 2
data.caption: Real client. Professional quality. Ready to use.

data.title: Where Teams Use Live Event Content Videos
data.subtitle: We focus on capturing high-quality video on site because it's the hardest part to recreate later. Once those conversations are captured, they power virtually every element of your sales and marketing.

items.title: Sales Follow-Ups and Outreach
items.text: Send prospects a personalized video clip from your conversation at the booth. Nothing closes like face-to-face recall. Partner outreach, speaker applications, investor updates.

items.title: Landing Pages and Website
items.text: Add real video testimonials and product demos to your site. Written content becomes easier when you have the video to build from. Everything else builds from the footage.

items.title: Social Media and Paid Ads
items.text: Short-form vertical clips ready for LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. Run targeted ads with real footage instead of stock video. Stand out in every feed.

items.title: Email Sequences and Nurture
items.text: Build post-event email campaigns with embedded video. Repurposing becomes optional, not mandatory. Distribution becomes flexible. The video does the heavy lifting.

data.title: We understand positioning, messaging, and content strategy.
paragraphs: We've created content for hundreds of businesses and recorded hundreds of interviews across ecommerce and B2B. We don't just point a camera. We understand what makes a good story, what your buyers need to hear, and how to get it out of a 5-minute conversation.

Content Cucumber helps growing ecommerce and B2B brands turn ideas into assets that drive real results. From writing and strategy to video and distribution, we specialize in building marketing inventory that compounds over time.
Clear messaging. Smart execution. Content that works.

items.question: "We already have a videographer."
items.answer: Most videographers capture footage. We capture stories. We know what questions to ask, how to guide the conversation, and how to turn raw interviews into months of marketing content. The strategy is what makes Live Event Content different.

items.question: "Our team isn't comfortable on camera."
items.answer: That's exactly why we guide the conversations. No scripts, no teleprompters. We ask questions your team already knows the answers to and keep it relaxed. People are always surprised how natural it feels.

items.question: "We're not sure it's worth the investment."
items.answer: You're already spending thousands on the booth, travel, hotel, and team time. Live Event Content turns that existing investment into content that works for months. The question isn't whether you can afford it. It's whether you can afford to leave without it.

items.question: "How quickly do we get the final assets?"
items.answer: We deliver polished clips, raw footage, and captioned video within two weeks of the event. If you need rush delivery for a specific campaign, we can accommodate that too.

items.question: "Which conferences do you cover?"
items.answer: We cover events across the US, with deep experience at ecommerce and B2B conferences like Shop Talk, eTail, and industry-specific shows. If you're exhibiting, we can be there.

data.title: Ready to turn your next conference into a content engine?
data.text: Tell us which event you're attending. We'll put together a Live Event Content plan that turns your booth presence into months of marketing assets. See our interview packages with pricing. PR agencies: see our agency services.
